name: bun-sql-executor
description: Implement BunSqlExecutor class using Bun.sql native driver with programmatic tagged template pattern
acceptanceCriteria: Constructor takes Bun.sql connection instance (SQL type from bun:sql)
execute([sql, params]) converts parameterized SQL to tagged template invocation
Tagged template pattern: sql.split(/\$\d+/) for parts, then sql(parts, ...params)
Handles edge cases: empty params array, trailing placeholders, consecutive placeholders
Returns array of rows as-is (normalization done by caller)
Includes executeMany(statements) for batch DDL execution
Connection getter exposes underlying SQL connection for advanced use
Unit tests verify correct SQL execution against test database
